label: Transparent okapi motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Okapi transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an okapi motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A graceful okapi in accurate natural anatomy, deep mahogany brown coat, velvety dark neck and body, white horizontal zebra-like stripes on hindquarters and upper legs, white stockings, dark hooves, subtle tan muzzle, short ossicones, alert ears. Natural fur texture, crisp subject edges, distinctive silhouette, no extra animals.
Composition/framing: centered complete side-profile cutout with generous padding; full body visible from nose to hooves to tail, not cropped. Clean studio lighting that preserves natural color and stripe detail. No cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no forest scene, no grass, no rocks, no props, no text, no watermark, no second subject, no stylized cartoon, no floor plane, no shadow.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Okapi light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Okapi", derived from an okapi motif: deep mahogany coat, crisp white horizontal hindquarter stripes, dark velvety body, tan muzzle, and Congo forest deep green context. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible distinctive catalog system.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation, target 3840x2160 feel with large readable labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Okapi, Okapi, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage.
Reference use: Extract palette and interaction language from mahogany okapi body, white stripe rhythm, dark hooves, tan muzzle highlights, Congo forest deep greens, leaf-shadow neutrals, and bright stripe contrast. The board must read as okapi stripes and Congo forest, not generic safari, zebra, tiger, or camouflage.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, bar chart, line chart, status chips, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius, warm ivory surfaces, mahogany primary actions, deep green sidebars and focus states, crisp stripe dividers, subtle okapi stripe texture bands, restrained shadows, dense but organized catalog/product dashboard UI.
Color palette: mahogany #5a2f25, stripe ivory #f7f1e6, deep Congo green #173c2d, leaf green #4f6f45, bark umber #3b2a22, tan muzzle #c7a06b, warm fog #eee8dc, ink #221a16.
Constraints: no zebra-only identity, no tiger orange, no generic purple/blue gradients, no neon colors, no beige-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Okapi", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Okapi dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Okapi". It must feel like the same light-mode okapi system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from okapi stripes, mahogany fur, tan muzzle highlights, and Congo forest deep green context.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation, target 3840x2160 feel with large readable labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Okapi, Okapi, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage.
Reference use: Preserve the okapi system language: near-black mahogany and Congo canopy backgrounds, stripe-ivory foreground text, mahogany active states, deep forest green sidebars, tan muzzle highlights, bark-umber borders, crisp horizontal stripe dividers, subtle okapi stripe texture bands. Must read as okapi, not zebra-only, tiger, generic safari, or camouflage.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, bar chart, line chart, status chips, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: deep canopy backgrounds, velvety dark cards, stripe-ivory text and hairline dividers, mahogany controls, forest-green focus rings, tan chart highlights, restrained contrast, crisp shadcn/tweakcn components, 8px grid, 8px card radius.
Color palette: canopy black-green #10231b, dark mahogany #2b1814, mahogany #6b3a2c, stripe ivory #f5eadb, forest green #2f5a3a, leaf moss #6f8552, tan muzzle #c79b63, bark border #4a3329.
Constraints: no neon colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no zebra-only identity, no tiger orange, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Okapi".
